audit_items.proof_trace: cache_destroy has a single linear control-flow path with no early exits, no return statements, and no branches that skip any free. All managed allocations are unconditionally freed in sequence: each free-pool item via the while loop (L58-64), cache->name (L65), cache->ptr (L66), and the cache struct itself (L68). The only conditional (L60) governs destructor invocation only, not the free on L63.
